project.description:
Run the Jenkins job to load the GOA GAF files into the database. Downloads from the following urls by default:
- ftp://ftp.ebi.ac.uk/pub/databases/GO/goa/ZEBRAFISH/goa_zebrafish.gaf.gz - ftp://ftp.ebi.ac.uk/pub/databases/GO/goa/ZEBRAFISH/goa_zebrafish_isoform.gaf.gz - ftp://ftp.ebi.ac.uk/pub/databases/GO/goa/ZEBRAFISH/goa_zebrafish_rna.gaf.gz
Those can be overridden by setting the environment variables:
- GOA_GAF_URL1 - GOA_GAF_URL2 - GOA_GAF_URL3
Steps: 1. Download the GOA (Gene Ontology Annotation) file for zebrafish from EBI — a GAF (Gene Association Format) file containing GO annotations from multiple sources (UniProt, Ensembl, GO_Central, RNAcentral, etc.) 2. Parse each line into a GafEntry — filtering out non-zebrafish entries and entries without valid taxon IDs 3. Map UniProt IDs to ZFIN genes — looks up the entryId (e.g., Q5XJQ7) in db_link to find the associated ZFIN gene. This is where the "Gene not found" errors come from. 4. Validate each annotation — checks evidence codes, inference fields, GO term validity (not obsolete, not in "Do Not Annotate" subset), publication mappings, protein binding rules, etc. 5. Generate MarkerGoTermEvidence records — for each valid entry, creates an annotation linking a ZFIN gene to a GO term with evidence code, publication, and inferences 6. Deduplicate — checks against existing annotations in the database. If a more specific annotation already exists, the new one is marked as "existing" and skipped. 7. Batch add new annotations to the database 8. Remove stale annotations — any previously-loaded annotations that aren't in the new GAF file are removed (these show up as "REMOVED" in the details file) 9. Write reports — details file (removed/added/updated/errors/existing), summary file, and now the error summary
Input File Details: goa_zebrafish.gaf.gz — The main file. Contains GO annotations for zebrafish proteins (UniProt accessions). Each row maps a protein to a GO term with evidence. Sources include UniProt (IEA — electronic annotations), GO_Central (IBA — phylogenetic), IntAct (IPI — protein interactions), and manual curation from various groups. This is the bulk of the data — the annotations that map to genes via UniProt ID → db_link → ZFIN gene.
goa_zebrafish_isoform.gaf.gz — Annotations for specific protein isoforms (splice variants). Same format as the main file, but the geneProductFormID field (column 17) contains isoform-specific accessions like UniProtKB:E9QI36-1, UniProtKB:E9QI36-2. These provide more granular annotations — e.g., isoform 1 of a protein localizes to the cytoplasm while isoform 2 localizes to the mitochondrion.
goa_zebrafish_rna.gaf.gz — Annotations for non-coding RNA sequences. These use RNAcentral IDs (URS*) rather than UniProt accessions.

hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.name: RUN_MGTE_CLEANUP
hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.description: If checked, run cleanMarkerGoTermEvidenceDuplicatesTask after the load (and before the "after" snapshot is captured).

hudson.tasks.Shell.command: set -e # Capture the BEFORE snapshot of GOA marker_go_term_evidence (artifact). OUT=$TARGETROOT/server_apps/DB_maintenance/gafLoad/Load-GAF-GOA_m SQL=$SOURCEROOT/server_apps/DB_maintenance/gafLoad mkdir -p "$OUT" PSQL="psql -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -h $PGHOST -d $DBNAME" $PSQL -v org=GOA -v stage=tmp_gaf_mgoe_before -f $SQL/snapshot_mgte.sql $PSQL -c "\copy (SELECT * FROM tmp_gaf_mgoe_before ORDER BY zdb_id) TO STDOUT CSV HEADER" > "$OUT/mgoe_before.csv" echo "BEFORE snapshot rows: $(( $(wc -l < "$OUT/mgoe_before.csv") - 1 ))"

set -e # Optional: run the marker_go_term_evidence duplicate cleanup after the load. # When enabled, the AFTER snapshot below reflects the post-cleanup state. if [ "$RUN_MGTE_CLEANUP" = "true" ]; then echo "RUN_MGTE_CLEANUP=true -> running cleanMarkerGoTermEvidenceDuplicatesTask" cd $SOURCEROOT gradle cleanMarkerGoTermEvidenceDuplicatesTask else echo "RUN_MGTE_CLEANUP not true -> skipping cleanup" fi

set -e # Capture the AFTER snapshot (post-load, and post-cleanup when RUN_MGTE_CLEANUP=true). OUT=$TARGETROOT/server_apps/DB_maintenance/gafLoad/Load-GAF-GOA_m SQL=$SOURCEROOT/server_apps/DB_maintenance/gafLoad PSQL="psql -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -h $PGHOST -d $DBNAME" $PSQL -v org=GOA -v stage=tmp_gaf_mgoe_after -f $SQL/snapshot_mgte.sql $PSQL -c "\copy (SELECT * FROM tmp_gaf_mgoe_after ORDER BY zdb_id) TO STDOUT CSV HEADER" > "$OUT/mgoe_after.csv"
# SECONDARY diff: logical (churn-excluded) rollup for curators -- collapses protein # isoforms and id/protein churn to show annotations that truly appeared/disappeared. $PSQL -f $SQL/diff_mgte.sql $PSQL -c "\copy (SELECT * FROM tmp_gaf_real_removed ORDER BY publication,gene_zdb_id,go_id) TO STDOUT CSV HEADER" > "$OUT/mgoe_logical_removed.csv" $PSQL -c "\copy (SELECT * FROM tmp_gaf_real_added ORDER BY publication,gene_zdb_id,go_id) TO STDOUT CSV HEADER" > "$OUT/mgoe_logical_added.csv" $PSQL -c "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_gaf_mgoe_before, tmp_gaf_mgoe_after, tmp_gaf_real_removed, tmp_gaf_real_added" echo "Logical (churn-excluded): removed=$(( $(wc -l < "$OUT/mgoe_logical_removed.csv") - 1 )) added=$(( $(wc -l < "$OUT/mgoe_logical_added.csv") - 1 ))"
cd $SOURCEROOT
# PRIMARY diff (row-level / database): key = every column except zdb_id, ignore # zdb_id so a row that only got a recycled id lands in updates_ignored rather than # add+delete. CSVDIFF_XLSX_ONLY -> single mgoe_dbdiff.xlsx workbook (deletes/adds/ # updated_1/updated_2 sheets); the intermediate CSVs are removed. export CSVDIFF_XLSX_ONLY=true gradle csvDiff --args="$OUT/mgoe_dbdiff $OUT/mgoe_before.csv $OUT/mgoe_after.csv marker,term,source,evidence,relation,created_by,contributed_by,protein_acc,inferred_from,annotation_extensions,noctua_model zdb_id"
# Fold the logical rollup into its own workbook (removed/added sheets), then drop # the intermediate CSVs so only mgoe_logical.xlsx is archived. gradle csv2xlsx --args="$OUT/mgoe_logical.xlsx $OUT/mgoe_logical_removed.csv $OUT/mgoe_logical_added.csv" rm -f "$OUT/mgoe_logical_removed.csv" "$OUT/mgoe_logical_added.csv"
